Comment: Security headers for Laundry & Co static site
Name: LaundryAndCo-SecurityHeaders

ContentSecurityPolicy.ContentSecurityPolicy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://www.googletagmanager.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https:; connect-src 'self' https://www.google-analytics.com; frame-ancestors 'none'
